paper_title: Using DeepSpeed and Megatron to Train Megatron-Turing NLG 530B, A Large-Scale Generative Language Model

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Megatron-Turing NLG 530B, the largest monolithic transformer-based language model to date, leveraging a novel **3D parallelism** framework combining data, tensor, and pipeline parallelism optimized with DeepSpeed and Megatron frameworks. Enables scalable training on massive clusters using mixed precision and gradient checkpointing
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale curated text corpus (including Common Crawl and other high-quality web datasets)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language generation, zero/few-shot learning, advanced NLP tasks, and in-context learning
raw_extraction.license: Closed-source (as implied by joint Microsoft/NVIDIA collaboration)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling large language models beyond 175B parameters while optimizing memory and compute efficiency for distributed training environments
